allow: Bash(ssh alex@192.168.1.5 "~/.local/bin/yt-dlp --version && /home/alex/Elbot/.venv/bin/pip show yt-dlp 2>/dev/null || echo ''yt-dlp not in venv''")

Bash(ssh alex@192.168.1.5 "grep -q ''.deno/bin'' ~/.bashrc && echo ''Already in bashrc'' || echo ''export DENO_INSTALL=""/home/alex/.deno""'' >> ~/.bashrc && echo ''export PATH=""$DENO_INSTALL/bin:$PATH""'' >> ~/.bashrc && echo ''Added to bashrc''")
Bash(ssh alex@192.168.1.5 'export DENO_INSTALL=""/home/alex/.deno"" && export PATH=""$DENO_INSTALL/bin:$PATH"" && deno --version')
Bash(ssh alex@192.168.1.5 'rm -rf /home/alex/.deno && sed -i ""/DENO_INSTALL/d"" ~/.bashrc && sed -i ""/DENO_INSTALL/d"" ~/.bashrc && echo ""Deno cleaned up""')

Bash(ssh alex@192.168.1.5 'ls -la /home/alex/.local/share/Elbot/Lavalink.jar && java -jar /home/alex/.local/share/Elbot/Lavalink.jar --version 2>/dev/null || echo ""Cannot get version from jar directly""')

Bash(ssh alex@192.168.1.5 'systemctl list-units --all 2>/dev/null | grep -i lava; docker ps 2>/dev/null | grep -i lava; cat /etc/systemd/system/lavalink.service 2>/dev/null || echo ""No lavalink.service""')
Bash(ssh alex@192.168.1.5 'ps aux | grep -i lava | grep -v grep; docker ps -a 2>/dev/null | grep -i lava')

Bash(ssh alex@192.168.1.5 'curl -s ""https://api.github.com/repos/lavalink-devs/Lavalink/releases/latest"" | python3 -c ""import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\(d[\\""tag_name\\""]\); [print\(a[\\""browser_download_url\\""]\) for a in d[\\""assets\\""] if a[\\""name\\""].endswith\(\\"".jar\\""\)]""')
Bash(ssh alex@192.168.1.5 'rm -f /home/alex/.local/share/Elbot/plugins/*.jar && sudo systemctl restart elbot.service && echo ""Restarted""')
Bash(ssh alex@192.168.1.5 'sudo systemctl restart elbot.service && sleep 5 && systemctl status elbot.service --no-pager 2>&1 | head -10')

Bash(ssh alex@192.168.1.5 'curl -s ""https://api.github.com/repos/lavalink-devs/Lavalink/releases"" | python3 -c ""import sys,json; [print\(r[\\""tag_name\\""]\) for r in json.load\(sys.stdin\) if r[\\""tag_name\\""].startswith\(\\""4.0\\""\)]""')

Bash(ssh alex@192.168.1.5 'curl -L -o /home/alex/.local/share/Elbot/Lavalink.jar ""https://github.com/lavalink-devs/Lavalink/releases/download/4.0.6/Lavalink.jar"" && echo -n ""https://github.com/lavalink-devs/Lavalink/releases/download/4.0.6/Lavalink.jar"" > /home/alex/.local/share/Elbot/lavalink.url && rm -f /home/alex/.local/share/Elbot/plugins/*.jar && sudo systemctl restart elbot.service && echo ""Reverted to 4.0.6""')
